candidates.row_label: Cost of goods and services sold
candidates.why: Direct cost-of-sales line and best COGS match.

final_choice.row_label: Cost of goods and services sold

variables.notes: CR:c|high|double. Using the reported direct cost line, with the alternate COGS label as fallback priority for years where labels may differ.
